review.summary: All 3 critical and 4 major review issues have been fixed. Remaining: 9 minor issues.

critical.fix: Replaced ?? with correct Chinese column mapping
Created alembic/ with env.py, script.py.mako, and initial migration 001_initial.py
Created vite.config.ts with React plugin and API proxy

major.description: Backtest page missing equity curve chart
major.fix: Added AreaSeries chart using lightweight-charts with baseline comparison
Integrated react-markdown + remark-gfm with markdown styles
Added parent_id field with self-referencing FK for tree structure
All 11 models migrated to Mapped + mapped_column (85 mapped fields)
Added AutoComplete with debounced search API in Market page
Created Watchlist page with add/remove, added route and sidebar menu
Created schemas.py for all 6 service directories: knowledge, market, indicator, backtest, trading, user

minor: fetch_kline column names normalized to English (data_source.py)
market/router.py updated for English column names
backtest page label fixed (最大回抽 → 最大回撤)
Design system applied: CSS tokens + component classes + responsive
Login/signup page with JWT auth flow

remaining_minor: Read count update not atomic (should use UPDATE counter)
Article search only matches title, not summary/content
Indicator calculations have no session cache
Backtest does not account for price limit up/down
Limit orders executed as market orders
Search API fetches all 5000+ stocks on each call
